name: Thai Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the green cabbage and red cabbage.
2. Slice the green onion, seed the Jalapeno pepper, chop the cucumber, red pepper, and cilantro.
3. Chop the peanuts into small pieces.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the oil, rice wine vinegar, curry powder, sugar, and crushed garlic until well combined.
5. Add the shredded cabbage, sliced green onion, seeded Jalapeno pepper, chopped cucumber, chopped red pepper, chopped cilantro, and chopped peanuts to the bowl with the dressing.
6. Toss all ingredients together until evenly coated.
7. Serve immediately.
